type: 学术期刊图形摘要（Graphical Abstract）
goal: 生成一张可直接用于期刊投稿的 Graphical Abstract，要求极简、白底、工程化克制配色、几秒内可读、绝无营销海报感

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text, suitable for grayscale print

title_block.rule: most journals do not allow titles inside the graphical abstract; enable only when user explicitly requested a title

sections.label: Problem
sections.summary: long-context QA degrades when key evidence is buried in 100K+ token corpora
sections.depiction: a minimal line-art sketch of a tall stack of document pages with one tiny highlighted line, and a question mark glyph hovering above

sections.label: Method
sections.depiction: a minimal schematic of a dense retriever feeding top-K chunks into a small reranker block, then into an LLM block, all line-art rectangles connected by thin arrows

sections.label: Key Mechanism
sections.summary: evidence-aware attention concentrates on top-ranked chunks during decoding
sections.depiction: a small attention strip showing K candidate chunk bars; only top-ranked bars receive denser attention lines pointing to the answer span; line-art style

sections.label: Outcome
sections.summary: consistent gains on multi-hop and needle-in-haystack benchmarks
sections.depiction: a minimal qualitative bar-chart sketch (no numerical tick labels) with two grouped bars per benchmark; the proposed method bars are slightly taller, drawn in line-art with a single warm tint fill

section_block_style.shape: implicit columns separated by generous whitespace, NOT four heavy rectangles in a row
section_block_style.header_text: section label in bold sans-serif, 12-13pt, top-aligned
section_block_style.summary_text: single phrase, 10pt regular, max 2 lines, no period
section_block_style.depiction_size: around 35-50% of column height, vertically centered

connectors.style: thin arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads, dark gray #334155, between adjacent sections only
connectors.rule: no crossing, no curved decorative arcs; arrows convey 'leads to' / 'analyzed by' relationships

color_palette.rule: deep blue #1E3A8A as primary, slate blue #3B82F6 as secondary, charcoal #1F2937 for line-art and text; one low-saturation amber #F59E0B accent reserved exclusively for the Outcome bars in P4

typography.consistency: all section headers identical size; all summaries identical size; never mix serif and sans-serif

must_keep: all four sections visually equal-weight, no section dominates
white background, no gradient, no decorative pattern, no photographic background
summaries are short phrases, never full sentences with periods
the figure must look like it could appear on an Elsevier / ACS / IEEE table of contents page
no fabricated numbers anywhere; the Outcome bars are qualitative shape only
avoid: marketing-poster aesthetics, brand campaign aesthetics, magazine cover aesthetics
3D effects, drop shadows, gradients, glossy fills, lens flare
fabricated numerical tick labels, fabricated percentages
saturated colors, more than 3 main colors plus 1 accent
